material_events: The Board of Directors elected Carolyn R. Bertozzi, Ph.D as a new independent director effective December 8, 2025, with appointment to the Science and Technology Committee and Ethics and Compliance Committee. Dr. Bertozzi will stand for shareholder election at the May 2026 annual meeting and participate in standard director compensation arrangements.
